content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track heading into a right-hand curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 105, target = (105 + 5) % 120 = 110
- Waypoint 110: x=1.4401, y=0.8561
- Car: x=1.3692, y=1.2726
- Bearing = atan2(0.8561 - 1.2726, 1.4401 - 1.3692) = atan2(-0.4165, 0.0709) ≈ -80.3°
- Current heading: -41.72°
- Delta = -80.3° - (-41.72°) = -38.6° → right turn needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead (delta ≈ -39°), car is left of center at heading -41.7° and needs to steer right to follow waypoints curving south toward waypoint 110 at bearing -80°.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track loops sharply south around waypoints 103-115 then curves back northeast",
    "Waypoints 108-115 trend south/southeast — car must steer right significantly here",
    "Car heading -42° needs to decrease further (more negative) to follow track south",
    "Positive delta = steer left, negative delta = steer right",
    "At delta -35 to -45°, use steering_angle=-20 at speed 1.0",
    "Car is left of center — track curving right confirms right steering needed",
    "After waypoint 115, track begins heading northeast — watch for left turn",
    "Avoid oversteer oscillation on straights; use smallest valid angle when delta < 10°",
    "Progress ~88%, approaching final stretch of lap",
    "Track width ~0.76m, distance from center 0.175m — still within safe bounds"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.206, 1.304, 1.369],
    "y": [1.394, 1.328, 1.273],
    "yaw": [-47.2, -42.0, -41.7]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -38.6,
  "speed": 1.0,
  "steering_angle": -20.0
}
```
